value.text:
Your power... It far exceeds
what I foresaw...
Here. Take the MARSHBADGE.

TM04 contains CALM MIND.
It raises Sp.Atk and Sp.Def.

properties.name: text-defeated
properties.value:
Your power... It far
exceeds what I foresaw...

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
I had a vision of your
arrival!
I have had psychic powers
since I was a child.
I foresaw that you would come.

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
I had psychic powers
since I was a little girl...
I always knew what other
people were thinking...

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
Heheh! I can see your
future in my crystal ball!

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
The spirits tell me you
will lose!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
SABRINA sees into the
future. You have no hope.

properties.name: text-defeated
properties.value:
I didn't see that one
coming...

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
I can predict your every
move!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
SABRINA's psychic power
lets her communicate
with POK{e}MON!

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
I see your doom in
my crystal ball!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
You have potential.
I can sense it.

properties.name: text-defeated
properties.value:
Impossible! I read the
wrong thoughts!

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
I knew you were coming!
I can read your thoughts!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
SABRINA is the most
powerful psychic I know!

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
Ke...ke...ke...ke...
Do you believe in ghosts?

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
You'll never find your way
through this GYM!
